title: feat: add image input support for flux-2-dev model
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Flux-2-dev gets eyes
gist.blurb: You can now pass images directly into the flux-2-dev model for image-to-image generation. Just drop an image URL into your request and let the pixels flow.
gist.summary: Added image-to-image support for the flux-2-dev model by enabling the image_urls parameter in the backend API integration.
gist.impact: Users can now transform existing images using flux-2-dev by passing an ?image=<url> parameter alongside their text prompts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee handing a physical photograph to the Monitor Robot, who is processing it into a new image. Represents image-to-image translation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a tiny glowing photograph to a chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen displays a beautiful new landscape being painted. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
